resources.string: This is a real-world, real-time, location based game. Take care whilst playing, and always be aware of hazards around you.
Other players will be able to see your real-life location. By playing, you agree to allow other players to see your real-life location.
Playing this game whilst driving, operating machinery, cycling, or whilst in command of air or water craft may be illegal and dangerous.
Observe all local laws, and do not engage in unlawful trespass or other criminal activity.
You are solely responsible for your decision to play this game, and any consequences that may arise from doing so.

Counterforce is a free game that does not engage in any marketing whatsoever, and personal information will be treated with utmost respect. Policy changes will always be by prior agreement in order to continue playing, should Counterforce ever become a marketable product.

A unique, securely-encrypted key derived from your device\'s identity is used for the sole purpose of identifying your account. Other non-personally-identifying parameters of the device, and lists of running apps/services, may be accessed to prevent cheating.

Your real world location will be shared with other players. A \"Privacy Zone\" feature exists which allows you to obscure sensitive locations such as home and workplaces from the game. It is advisable to make use of this facility before you begin playing, by clicking the icon on the registration screen or accessing it in the Settings menu later. It bears the following symbol:

All in-game activity is logged on the server for administration, debugging and development purposes. Cooperation with the UK authorities (or their nominated parties) will be made in the highly unlikely event that they should wish to access the data for the purposes of law enforcement, security or national interests.
No making threats of violence against other players.
No pornographic or offensive names or avatars.
Alert the admins of any glitches or exploits you discover.
Making multiple accounts, including by uninstalling and reinstalling the game, is forbidden.
I agree to the above, that I am solely responsible for my own actions and choice to play this game, and will exercise common sense when doing so.
A unique identity could not be determined for this device, because it is either a non-cellular tablet, emulator, unsupported phone, or the "Telephony"/"Read Phone State" permission was not enabled.
Unfortunately, only cellular phones (or other devices that at least take a SIM card) are supported.

Emulator use is strictly forbidden. Registering an account with one will result in a permanent ban not only for that account, but for all devices that are determined to have shared the same IP or geographical address too! DO NOT CONTINUE if this is the case. Press \"Quit\".

If you are using a regular cellular phone and thus getting this message in error, please \"Quit\", check that all permissions required by this app are enabled in the app settings, and try again. Please e-mail the developer or report to the Discord group if this does not fix the problem.
Equip this system to fire missiles from your location.
Equip this system to intercept enemy missiles from your location.
Used to purchase and fire missiles.
Established at %1$s accuracy, but must be better than %2$s. Searching for better...
You cannot build here as you are too close to other structures.
You cannot build an ore mine here as all ore in the vicinity is already being mined.\nYou must be at least %1$s from:
Your online structures cost %1$s per hour.
Your maintenance costs exceed your wealth generation.
Using %1$s location (%2$.6f, %3$.6f) with accuracy %4$s from %5$s ago.
The following players wish to join %1$s
You have no available missiles in range of this target.
You have no available interceptors in range of this target.
Click on the map to define a new privacy zone, or click existing zones to edit them.
Your player is currently within this privacy zone. It will become effective only once your player has moved outside of it.
You are in a privacy zone. Using your last location outside of this zone.
Please register a username and avatar:
Please specify an alliance name, description and avatar:
Your alliance is at war with this alliance.
You have requested to join this alliance, and are waiting for a leader to approve or decline.
Alliance name taken. Please specify another.
A major software update has been released.
The update must be installed before you can log in again. It should be available to all regions within a few hours.
You must specify a target. Touch locations or entities on the map to designate them as a target first.
Target out of range. You may only designate a target within the range circle.
Wilful friendly fire is not allowed.
Your interceptor cannot intercept the selected missile.
Waiting for data. Please try again in a moment.
You must respawn before you can do this!
The system is reloading and cannot yet fire.
This missile is preparing and cannot yet fire.
The system is offline and cannot fire.
Decommission %1$s for %2$s refund? (this will take %3$s to complete)

Are you sure you want to close your account?\n\nYour player will be removed from the game and all your structures will be deleted immediately. This action cannot be undone! Once again, are you sure you want to delete your player and all your structures and units?
Construct an %1$s at your location for %2$s?
Switch to auto?\n\nIn auto mode, threats will be engaged automatically at any time, regardless of whether you\'re online or alive.
Switch to semi auto?\n\nIn semi auto mode, threats will only be automatically be engaged when you are offline or dead. You will have control whenever you are online and alive.
Switch to manual?\n\nIn manual mode, threats will not be engaged automatically. You will have full control.
Request to join %1$s? This will cancel your request to join %2$s.
Leave %1$s? You will have to wait %2$s before you can join or create another alliance.
Leave %1$s? As you are the only leader, this will disband the alliance. You will have to wait %2$s before you can join or create another alliance.
Promote %1$s to be a leader of %2$s? This promotion will be permanent until they leave.
You are in the cooloff period from leaving your previous alliance, and must wait %1$s before you can create or join another.
You are dead. You may respawn in %s.
Use two fingers to set the avatar image bounds.
Please select the avatar image bounds.
Upgrade the launcher from %1$d slots to %2$d for %3$s?
Upgrade the launcher from %1$d slots to %2$d for %3$s? (Long-press to upgrade all the way to the max at once.)
Upgrade the reload system from %1$s to %2$s for %3$s?

Bring %1$s online?

It will cost %2$s per hour to run.

It will take %3$s to boot.

Take %1$s offline?

You will save %2$s per hour.

It takes %3$s to bring it back online.
You will heal naturally in %1$s. Heal fully now for %2$s?
You will die of radiation poisoning unless you leave the radioactive area or it dissipates. Heal fully now for %1$s?
You are already at full health.
You are dead and cannot heal.
Build a SAM battery or buy an air defence system to protect yourself from threats.
Build a missile battery or buy a cruise missile system.
Your structures will spontaneously go offline if you can\'t afford the hourly costs.
You can\'t do anything and aren\'t generating income. Respawn as soon as possible.
Radiation slowly drains your HP. If you can\'t leave, you should heal yourself periodically.
Hourly wealth generation stops above %1$s. Spend some money!
%1$s is much more powerful than you. Attacking them will likely result in a devastating retaliation. Continue?
%1$s is respawn protected. Them and their semi-transparent structures are currently invulnerable for %2$s. Continue?
You are currently respawn protected, and will be invulnerable for %1$s. Launching a missile will remove this invulnerability now. Continue?
Create radiation with a ground-burst or EMP effects with an air-burst.
Long-press to reset this player\'s avatar.
Too fast to be engaged by some interceptor types.
Welcome, commander. Would you like a tutorial?
Please specify a valid username. It must contain valid, visible characters and comply with the game rules.
Accept affiliation from %1$s? This will last until %2$s.
Your alliance is affiliated with this alliance.
An affiliation proposal exists between your alliance and this one.
The following alliances wish to affiliate with %1$s
Alternatively, press \"Generate Identity\" to create a restricted, non-supported and non-recoverable tablet account.
Reject affiliation proposal and declare war on %1$s? This war will last until the end of the week (%2$s) or until either alliance disbands.
Counterforce requires the following permissions to be enabled:
Counterforce is a multiplayer online game, and therefore requires internet access.
TCP/IP is required for Counterforce to communicate with the game server, which this permission enables.
Counterforce offers optional vibration to accompany \"under attack\" warnings.
Configuration files and other game elements are cached on your device for efficiency. Counterforce must be able to read and write to storage to facilitate this.
Counterforce is a location-based game that uses your device\'s GPS to place your character in the game world. The \"fine location\" permission is required for this to work.
Your Counterforce account requires a unique identity, which is securely derived from your device\'s IMEI\/MEID. The \"read phone state\" permission enables this information to be retreived.
Counterforce raises optional \"under attack\" notifications. This permission enables the threat checking service to automatically re-enable itself after a reboot.
Press the button below to show prompts asking you to enable the permissions. If this doesn\'t work, you will need to enable the permissions in Android Settings \> Apps \> Counterforce \> Permissions
You will receive warnings that you or your allies are under attack.

Counterforce is struggling to determine your location. Please ensure your device\'s GPS is switched on, with high accuracy enabled. If you\'ve already done this, try taking your device outside or near a window.
A general error occurred. Please contact an administrator.
The new connection settings were not applied as they were invalid.
You cannot leave an alliance while in battle!
%s is still in battle and cannot be kicked!
You cannot join an alliance while in battle!
%s is still in battle and cannot be accepted yet!
You cannot create an alliance while respawn protected. Your respawn protection ends in %1$s.
Notification sound & vibration are now part of Apps & Notifications in Android settings.
You must specify a ban reason!
Having a name that broke the game rules
Uploading an image that broke the game rules
Long-press to reset this player\'s name.
This object is beyond your radar range. Move closer or activate a radar station to see it.
Fast enough to intercept any non-ICBM missile.
Electronic Countermeasures reduce interceptor hit chance.
Press + to transfer %1$s to %2$s. Current amount to send: %3$s.
You have been promoted to the rank of %s. Your basic income has increased.
You have been demoted to the rank of %s. Your basic income has decreased.
You can\'t afford to send this much wealth.
You cannot afford to add any more wealth.
You cannot send money if you are respawn protected, or to players who are respawn protected.
You cannot raise bounty if you are respawn protected or raise the bounty of a respawn protected player.
You cannot raise bounty while respawn protected or to a respawn protected player.
You must have a net worth of at least %s before you can raise bounty.
You must have a net worth of at least %s before you can give another player wealth.
Cancel the decommissioning of this structure?
You have less than -2500 experience. You will have no respawn protection when you respawn, and will be vulnerable to attack.
You are currently respawn protected, and will be invulnerable for %1$s. Buying anything nuclear will remove this invulnerability now. Continue?
Select a ship, submarine, or water location to specify target.
You are currently respawn protected, and will be invulnerable for %1$s. Manually launching an interceptor will remove this invulnerability now. Continue?
You are currently respawn protected, and will be invulnerable for %1$s. Buying anything nuclear will remove this invulnerability now. Continue?
This player is a much lower rank than you. You will lose experience if you attack them. Continue?
Surrender to %1$s? You will lose experience and they will get a reward.
Switch ICBM silo to auto-retaliate? In auto mode, the silo will return fire at the owner of any incoming ICBMs whether you are online or offline.
Switch ICBM silo to semi-auto? In semi-auto mode the silo will retaliate against the owner of incoming ICBMs only if you are offline.
Switch ICBM silo to manual? In manual mode, the silo will not retaliate.
Upgrade the airbase capacity from %1$d aircraft to %2$d aircraft for %3$s?
The tanker you selected does not have enough fuel to transfer.
Choose a destination to face towards.
Choose A Tanker To Refuel From.
Choose A Vessel To Refuel From.
You must specify a refueling tanker before proceeding.
You must specify an aircraft to refuel before proceeding.
You must specify a vessel to receive fuel from before proceeding.
You must specify a vessel to refuel before proceeding.
Touch the map to select destination.
Touch the map to add coordinates. %1$d\/%2$d selected.
Touch the map to select a coordinate to face towards.
You must select a tanker aircraft first.
Select a tanker for this aircraft to receive fuel from.
Select a tanker for this vessel to receive fuel from.
Select an aircraft for this one to provide fuel to.
Select a vessel for this one to provide fuel to.
You do not have enough fuel to do this.
You do not have enough food to do this.
You cannot refuel this unit during combat.
You must specify a target. Touch missiles or aircraft on the map to designate them as a target first.
The aircraft is on the ground and cannot fire.
Fast and long ranged with medium armament.
Used to purchase and fire ICBMs.
The aircraft must land before it can be re-armed.
The airbase is offline and cannot refuel aircraft.
The airbase is offline and cannot re-arm aircraft.
The aircraft will head back to base, but since its home base is offline it cannot land.
The aircraft has no home base to return to. Select a new home base.
Rings indicate hostile airspace. if your aircraft enters this range, it will be fired upon.
You cannot repair structures while in battle.
The following alliances wish to surrender to %1$s
Set aircraft to auto-return? Aircraft will return to base when fuel level drops to within 5% of fuel needed for return trip.
Set aircraft to manual-return? Aircraft will not return to base and will crash when fuel runs out.
This aircraft is not set to return to base when fuel is low.
This aircraft is set to return to base when fuel is low automatically.
Touch the map to measure distance.
Aircraft must be flying before you can do this.
Select a new homebase to continue.
Touch an airbase on the map to select it as this aircraft\'s new homebase.
You cannot do this while the bank is offline.
The bank does not have room to deposit this amount.
You must select a new homebase for the aircraft.
You may only send your aircraft to airbases that are open or owned by you.
Too far from the selected command post.
The selected depot is too far away.
%1$s is less than 1/10th your size. You will lose XP if you kill them, you will get no financial reward, and the kill will not be added to your stats. Continue?
Place a blueprint on the map to continue.
Pay %s to place the blueprint? The blueprint will expire in %s and the cost is not refundable.
Place a structure on the map to continue.
You cannot do this while your alliance is in battle.
This will send an alert to every player in your alliance. Proceed?
This interceptor has a nuclear warhead. It has a 100% chance to destroy its target, and a smaller chance to destroy other missiles/aircraft in the blast radius.
This torpedo is armed with a nuclear warhead. It will deal severe damage to any vessel within a large radius.
This structure is destroyed and must be repaired before it can be reactivated.
This torpedo will home-in on a target within %s once one is acquired. (It may lock-on to friendly ships, so use carefully!
Select a tanker for this aircraft to receive fuel from.
This unit is under construction. You must wait until it is finished to use it.
Purchase a tank for %1$s? This will take %2$s to produce.
Queue is full. You must wait until production is finished to build more.
Use electronic warfare? This will temporarily disable the target.
The structure must be online to do this.
Tracks naval targets and deals extra damage.
You cannot sell units while in battle.
The vessel must be within %s of a shipyard before it can be sold.
The sonar is cooling down. You must wait %s before using it again.
Perform a sonar ping? This will reveal enemy submarines in range, but it will also reveal THIS ship to all players!
Perform a sonar ping? This will reveal enemy submarines in range, but it will also reveal THIS submarine to all players!
You have no available torpedoes in range of this target.
This torpedo is preparing and cannot yet fire.
You have %1$d aircraft costing %2$s per hour.
You have %1$d tanks costing %2$s per hour.
You have %1$d ships costing %2$s per hour.
You have %1$d submarines costing %2$s per hour.
You have %1$d ICBMs costing %2$s per hour.
You have %1$d missiles costing %2$s per hour.
You have %1$d interceptors costing %2$s per hour.
You have %1$d torpedoes costing %2$s per hour.
You are paying %1$s alliance tax per hour.
Vessel in port. Will repair and refuel at top of the hour.
Make this unit cease any ongoing attacks and hold position?
SUBMARINE SUBMERGED. Anti-submarine missiles or nuclear weapons required.
This submarine is submerged. The missile you are attacking it with will have no effect. You must use anti-submarine missiles or torpedoes to damage submerged submarines. Fire anyway?
Sell this vessel for %1$s? This action will be completed instantly and cannot be undone.
Sell this unit for %1$s? This will be completed instantly and cannot be undone.
You must be within %1$s of the structure to capture it.
Upgrade the shipyard\'s construction capacity to build multiple vessels at once.
Add a construction slot to the shipyard? This will cost %1$s.

The shipyard does not have enough resources to be upgraded. You must have %1$s, and the shipyard\'s cargo bay must contain at least %2$s concrete and %3$s machinery. Load concrete and machinery into the shipyard\s cargo bay to fix this.
This unit cannot store this kind of cargo.
The selected loot is too far away. You must select a loot that is inside the yellow range circle.
This bomb does extra damage to ships, submarines, ICBM silos, and ABM silos.
You cannot do this while your alliance is at war.
You cannot do this while you are in battle.
Select a player to transfer the account to.
Select a player on the map to transfer %1$s\'s account to it.
You must be an admin to do this. How did you even get here?
You must select an account to transfer to in order to continue.
This will transfer %1$s\'s account to %2$s. This will delete %3$s from the game and replace them with %4$s.
This will transfer %1$s\'s account to %2$s. This will delete %3$s from the game and replace them with %4$s. If you mess this up, Biscuit will enslave your entire family. Continue?
This missile will release a sonar ping on impact with water, detecting any hostile submarines within %1$s of the impact point.
Construct a %1$s? This will cost %2$s and %3$s.
Maximum coordinates reached. You may select up to %d coordinates.
Use two fingers to select units on the map.
You must ground all aircraft before you can do this.
All alliance members must ground all aircraft before you can do this.
You must wait %1$s before you can attack.
Delete this %1$s? This action cannot be undone.

Completely delete %1$s? Their player an all structures and units belonging to them will be erased. This action is not reversible. If you screw this up, Biscuit will enslave your entire family. Continue?
It appears you are logging an account in on a new device under suspicious circumstances. Please continue using the old device or contact admins.
You have successfully migrated to Google Sign-In. Please close the game and re-open it to continue.
Log out of your Google account? You will need to log in with this account or another account to continue playing.
This device already has an account associated with it. Log in using the Google Account already used on this device.
You are above %1$d total value. You can only attack other players above %2$d total value.
You are under %1$d total value. You can only attack other players under %2$d total value.
AREA IS CONTAMINATED. EXPOSURE LETHAL. Expires in: %1$s
Chemical weapons create contaminated areas that instantly kill players and infantry passing through them as well as preventing any structures inside them from being brought online.
This structure is contaminated by chemical weapons and cannot be brought online.
Some of your structures are contaminated by chemical weapons and cannot be brought online.
EMP weapons have a chance to reboot structures inside their blast radius.
The selected ship cannot hold aircraft.
Open this airbase? This will allow ANY other player to land aircraft here.
Close this airbase? This will prevent any other player, even allies, from landing here.
This will cancel your affiliation offer to $1%s. Continue?
Blacklisting %1$s will cause your SAMs to automatically shoot down their aircraft. Continue?
Whitelisting %1$s will allow their aircraft to pass through your airspace without being intercepted by your SAMs. Continue?
Upgrade to the maximum slot count of %1$d? This will cost %2$s.
Assault Ships carry aircraft and can deploy ground units without a port or shipyard.
Cargo Ships haul cargo and ground units between ports and shipyards.
Tap here to turn on app notifications to receive early warning of inbound attacks.
